sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 74

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 74:1
items.html: (to the question) The HaVaYaH in its order — Yod-Hey Vav-Hey — indicates the discernment of the Panim [face] of the Partzuf. And the HaVaYaH in squaring, thus: Yod; Yod-Hey; Yod-Hey-Vav; Yod-Hey-Vav-Hey — indicates the discernment of the Achoraim [posterior] of that Partzuf. (Item 10)
